title: "Choose boards" modal in app feature setup doesn't work sometime

posts.author: clement.devdevils (Clément)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there,

Having an issue with the board selection in the app feature setup, sometime no boards are listed:

image986×866 53.1 KB

Even after a refresh and cache cleaning. Hard to say what trigger this issue, because sometime it works well and not the day after.

Any idea on this?

posts.author: alessandra (Alessandra)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @clement.devdevils,

Thanks for bringing this to our attention. We’ll have to take a closer look at this behavior on your account.

Could you please send us a note at appsupport@monday.com?

Thanks!

posts.author: clement.devdevils (Clément)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @alessandra , I’ve just submitted a ticket to appsupport@monday.com

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you @clement.devdevils !

We will take a look from there
